'''âw-t-k''' ('''wataka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbold|unbold]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbold|unbold]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-t-k
|-
! Lemma
| wataka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:watakithi|watakithi]] || [[word:watakiji|watakiji]] || [[word:watakishi|watakishi]] || [[word:wataki|wataki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:watakuthuth|watakuthuth]] || [[word:watakujuj|watakujuj]] || [[word:watakushush|watakushush]] || [[word:watak|watak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:watakuthu|watakuthu]] || [[word:watakuju|watakuju]] || [[word:watakushu|watakushu]] || [[word:wataku|wataku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:watakufuth|watakufuth]] || [[word:watakufuj|watakufuj]] || [[word:watakufush|watakufush]] || [[word:watakuf|watakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:watakethe|watakethe]] || [[word:watakeje|watakeje]] || [[word:watakeshe|watakeshe]] || [[word:watake|watake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:watakothoth|watakothoth]] || [[word:watakojoj|watakojoj]] || [[word:watakoshosh|watakoshosh]] || [[word:watak|watak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:watakotho|watakotho]] || [[word:watakojo|watakojo]] || [[word:watakosho|watakosho]] || [[word:watako|watako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:watakofoth|watakofoth]] || [[word:watakofoj|watakofoj]] || [[word:watakofosh|watakofosh]] || [[word:watakof|watakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:watakĂŠthĂŠ|watakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:watakĂŠjĂŠ|watakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:watakĂŠshĂŠ|watakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:watakĂŠ|watakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:watakathath|watakathath]] || [[word:watakajaj|watakajaj]] || [[word:watakashash|watakashash]] || [[word:watak|watak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:watakatha|watakatha]] || [[word:watakaja|watakaja]] || [[word:watakasha|watakasha]] || [[word:wataka|wataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:watakafath|watakafath]] || [[word:watakafaj|watakafaj]] || [[word:watakafash|watakafash]] || [[word:watakaf|watakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:watakasha|watakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowatakasha|gowatakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwatakasha|gokiwatakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wataknĂŒsha|wataknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowataknknĂŒsha|gowataknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwataknĂŒsha|gokiwataknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:watakshĂ«sha|watakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowataknkshĂ«sha|gowataknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwatakshĂ«sha|gokiwatakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:watakrosha|watakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowataknkrosha|gowataknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwatakrosha|gokiwatakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:watakmusha|watakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowataknkmusha|gowataknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwatakmusha|gokiwatakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wataksherasha|wataksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowataknksherasha|gowataknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwataksherasha|gokiwataksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:watakngasha|watakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowataknkngasha|gowataknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwatakngasha|gokiwatakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:watakyasha|watakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowataknkyasha|gowataknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwatakyasha|gokiwatakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:watakyamasha|watakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowataknkyamasha|gowataknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwatakyamasha|gokiwatakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wataknĂŒshĂ«sha|wataknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowataknknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowataknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwataknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwataknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wataknĂŒrosha|wataknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowataknknĂŒrosha|gowataknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwataknĂŒrosha|gokiwataknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wataknĂŒmusha|wataknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowataknknĂŒmusha|gowataknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwataknĂŒmusha|gokiwataknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:watakshĂ«nĂŒsha|watakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowataknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowataknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwatakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwatakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:watakshĂ«rosha|watakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowataknkshĂ«rosha|gowataknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwatakshĂ«rosha|gokiwatakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watakshĂ«musha|watakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowataknkshĂ«musha|gowataknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwatakshĂ«musha|gokiwatakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:watakronĂŒsha|watakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowataknkronĂŒsha|gowataknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwatakronĂŒsha|gokiwatakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:watakroshĂ«sha|watakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowataknkroshĂ«sha|gowataknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwatakroshĂ«sha|gokiwatakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:watakromusha|watakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowataknkromusha|gowataknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwatakromusha|gokiwatakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:watakmunĂŒsha|watakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowataknkmunĂŒsha|gowataknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwatakmunĂŒsha|gokiwatakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:watakmushĂ«sha|watakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowataknkmushĂ«sha|gowataknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwatakmushĂ«sha|gokiwatakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:watakmurosha|watakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowataknkmurosha|gowataknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwatakmurosha|gokiwatakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:watak|watak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠtĂŠk|wĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howatak|howatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠtĂŠk|howĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowatak|hohowatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠtĂŠk|hohowĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwatak|nĂŒwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠtĂŠk|nĂŒwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwatak|nĂŒnĂŒwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠtĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwatak|nĂŻwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠtĂŠk|nĂŻwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwatak|nĂŻnĂŻwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠtĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwatak|luwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠtĂŠk|luwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwatak|luluwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠtĂŠk|luluwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwatak|liwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠtĂŠk|liwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwatak|liliwatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠtĂŠk|liliwĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowatak|kowatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠtĂŠk|kowĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowatak|kokowatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠtĂŠk|kokowĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewatak|kewatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠtĂŠk|kewĂŠtĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewatak|kekewatak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠtĂŠk|kekewĂŠtĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
